_comment: HO 174 — GA Senate 2026 GOP runoff seed. The May 19, 2026 Republican primary produced no majority winner; Mike Collins and Derek Dooley advanced to a June 16, 2026 runoff (Buddy Carter eliminated). Single-party runoff (GOP only) — unlike LA's per-party split. Hand-curated from Ballotpedia + AP-sourced primary coverage; no results yet. A post-June-16 handoff seeds the winner. See SKILL.md 'Runoff tracking'.
source: Ballotpedia + AP-sourced coverage of the May 19, 2026 GA Senate Republican primary (no majority; Collins + Dooley to a June 16 runoff, Carter eliminated).
